source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/03_ADD (HAD1717MCW)/▶ FDA/보안사항 회신/FDA 문의 사항에 대한 회답.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Response document addressing equivalence, product differences, safety information, and change rationale for adding ADD(HAD1717MCW).
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory response to questions about image evaluation equivalence, differences between HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW, objective safety information, and manufacturing process impact.
keyPoints: Detector MTF and DQE for ADD(HAD1717MCW) are stated to satisfy the specified criteria in EN 62220-1-1 Test Report A-TCF-5-089.
Clinical image comparison between HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW is stated to show no difference for body-part X-ray images, with reference to Clinical Report A-TCF-5-091.
The stated difference between HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW is detector dimension and related pixel/area values; other components and detector performance specifications are stated to be the same.
Objective safety information includes external EMC, Safety, and RoHS testing, 100% outgoing inspection, and 100% electrical safety testing.
The manufacturing process for HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW is stated to be identical, with no process change.

entities.name: ADD(HAD1717MCW)
entities.evidence: ADD(HAD1717MCW)에 대한 영상 평가 결과에 대한 동등성 견해

entities.name: H&abyz
entities.evidence: H&abyz는 유선 Type에 대해서만 1717 Size를 Detector만 보유하고 있어

concepts.name: Image evaluation equivalence
concepts.evidence: 비교 대상간 제품에 대한 특성 및 획득 영상에 대해서 이상이 없음.

concepts.name: MTF specification compliance
concepts.evidence: 설정된 MTF 및 DQE에 대해서 Spec에 만족 확인함.

concepts.name: DQE specification compliance
concepts.evidence: 설정된 MTF 및 DQE에 대해서 Spec에 만족 확인함.

concepts.name: Clinical image comparison
concepts.evidence: 영상에 대해서 비교 확인 시 차이가 없는 것으로 확인됨.

concepts.name: Detector dimension difference
concepts.evidence: Detector의 Dimension (Size) 차이 외 기타 구성품 및 Detector 성능(특성 Spec)은 모두 동일 함.

concepts.name: Electrical safety outgoing test
concepts.evidence: 제품 출하시 100% Electrical Safety Test 진행

concepts.name: Manufacturing process unchanged
concepts.evidence: HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW의 제조 Process 동일: Process 변경 없음

evidence.claim: The response addresses four requested topics: equivalence opinion, differences between HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW, objective safety information, and change reason/process differences.
evidence.evidenceText: 1) ADD(HAD1717MCW)에 대한 영상 평가 결과에 대한 동등성 견해 2) HAD1417MCW와 HAD1717MCW의 차이 설명 3) 안전하다고 간주될 수 있는 객관적인 정보 4) 변경이유 및 프로세스 차이

evidence.claim: ADD(HAD1717MCW) image evaluation found no abnormality in product characteristics and acquired images compared with the comparison target.
evidence.evidenceText: 비교 대상간 제품에 대한 특성 및 획득 영상에 대해서 이상이 없음.

evidence.claim: MTF and DQE were confirmed to satisfy the established specifications.
evidence.evidenceText: 설정된 MTF 및 DQE에 대해서 Spec에 만족 확인함.

evidence.claim: The MTF comparison cites EN 62220-1-1 Test Report A-TCF-5-089.
Clinical image comparison for X-ray images taken by body-part conditions found no difference between ADD HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: 인체 부위별 X-ray 촬영 조건(선량)으로 촬영된 ADD의 HAD1417MCW와 HAD1717MCW의 영상에 대해서 비교 확인 시 차이가 없는 것으로 확인됨.

evidence.claim: Clinical comparison referenced images from Skull through Knee Lat.
evidence.evidenceText: Skull에서 knee Lat까지 부위별 촬영 영상 확인함.

evidence.claim: Chest PA and Knee Lat image acquisition are listed as DICOM 3.0 for both HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW.
Other than detector dimension size, components and detector performance specifications are stated to be identical.
evidence.evidenceText: Detector의 Dimension (Size) 차이 외 기타 구성품 및 Detector 성능(특성 Spec)은 모두 동일 함.

evidence.claim: ADD(HAD1717MCW) dimensions are listed as 460 x 460 x 15 mm and ADD(HAD1417MCW) dimensions as 384 x 460 x 15 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: ADD (HAD1717MCW) ADD(HAD1417MCW) Dimension 460 x 460 x 15 mm 384 x 460 x 15 mm

evidence.claim: The source attributes the detector dimension difference to scintillator panel size difference.
evidence.evidenceText: Scintillator Panel Size의 차이로 Detector 기구물의 Dimension 차이 발생.

evidence.claim: Objective safety information includes external testing for EMC, Safety, and RoHS for ADD(HAD1717MCW).
evidence.evidenceText: ADD(HAD1717MCW)에 대해 외부시험 (EMC, Safety, RoHS) 진행.

evidence.claim: The product undergoes 100% outgoing inspection at shipment.
The product undergoes 100% electrical safety testing at shipment.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품 출하시 100% Electrical Safety Test 진행

evidence.claim: Electrical safety test items include Power Input, Dielectric Strength, Protective Earth Conductor Resistance, Earth Leakage Current, Touch Current, and Patient Leakage Current tests.
evidence.evidenceText: 항목: Power Input Test, Dielectric Strength Test Primary-Enclosure, Dielectric Strength Test Primary-Earth, Protective Earth Conductor Resistance Test, Earth Leakage Current Test, Touch Current Test, Patient Leakage Current Test

evidence.claim: The stated reason for adding HAD1717MCW was to secure market competitiveness by adding a wireless 1717 size detector.
evidence.evidenceText: 시장 경쟁성을 확보하고자 무선 Type의 1717 Size의 Detector를 보유하고자 “HAD1717MCW” Detector를 추가 인허가 신고함.

evidence.claim: The manufacturing process for HAD1417MCW and HAD1717MCW is stated to be identical with no process change.
evidence.evidenceText: HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW의 제조 Process 동일: Process 변경 없음

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not present; clinical study dates are present but are not identified as the document date.
Revision or version is not present in the source text.
Authority is inferred from source metadata and path signal for FDA; the main body text does not show FDA letterhead or an explicit authority statement.
Source contains transcription or OCR-like anomalies, including 'MFT 비교', '170IN X 17.0IN', '2st Inspection', and one instance of 'ADD(HAD1717MC)' without the final W.
